primary_extraction_goal: Recover a prespecified visual-trait contrast, visitation response unit, independent population/pollinator panel, n, variance or model uncertainty, and source locator.
do_not_infer: Do not convert categorical colour-morph contrasts or interaction-only results into a common high-versus-low visual effect without an explicitly oriented primary contrast.

primary_extraction_goal: Recover one source-supported visual-trait contrast and visitor response with a defined independent panel; retain population and pollinator-functional-group interactions.
do_not_infer: Do not average across populations or pollinator guilds before verifying shared sampling and a biologically oriented comparison.

primary_extraction_goal: Recover the damage denominator and a colour/visual contrast with count data or model uncertainty that supports an oriented damage odds effect.
do_not_infer: Do not treat multiple morph pairwise comparisons or damage types as independent clusters.

primary_extraction_goal: Recover the manipulated volatile/barrier contrast, floral-damage counts or model uncertainty, line/replicate identity, and source locator.
do_not_infer: Do not combine different transgenic lines or volatile components before confirming which contrast is a primary independent barrier manipulation.

primary_extraction_goal: Recover field-visitation contrast(s), natural-range classification, exposure denominator, independent plot/date/panel identity, and means/variance or model uncertainty.
column19: or laboratory-only responses in the predeclared flower-visitation stratum.
